data.body:
Whilst some sov cit types are claiming sabotage and other nutty theories, at present, it seems the most likely cause is that the extra pressure for the Corio refinery to refine more fuel has lead to some form of equipment fault, sparking the blaze. 

This is only a theory - a hypothesis - not facts.
